---
title: "About"
image: about_pic.jpeg          # add a profile.jpg to the root folder later
about:
  template: jolla           # try: jolla, trestles, solana, marquee, broadside
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/yourusername
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/rossouw-van-jaarsveld-bb5a23128
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:you@email.com
---

## Hi, I'm Rossouw van Jaarsveld

I like doing stuff with data.

## What You'll Find Here

My analytics passion. These are experiments and random thoughts I spend my free time on. 

## Tools I Use for my posts

- **R** 
- **Python** 
- **Quarto** 
- **GitHub**
